documentation_note: Canonical M1 envelope example for the usage-export payload family. The usage-export packet's pinned schema names its version field as usage_export_record_schema_version rather than schema_version; the M1 seed validation lane normalises either field name and asserts the pinned integer matches. The example also demonstrates the deprecated-field tracking the registry row carries (a legacy provider_account_id retained as preserve_as_unknown while the replacement provider_account_handle becomes the writable field).
